title: Aluan Ricciardi

infobox.value: This biographical article related to snowboarding in France is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Aluan_Ricciardi&action=edit).

(born 26 October 1987 in [Vera Cruz, Bahia](/wiki/Vera_Cruz,_Bahia "Vera Cruz, Bahia"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")) is a French [snowboarder](/wiki/Snowboarder "Snowboarder"). He placed fifteenth in the [men's halfpipe](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2010_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2010 Winter Olympics – Men's halfpipe") event at the [2010 Winter Olympics](/wiki/2010_Winter_Olympics "2010 Winter Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Evans, Hilary; Gjerde, Arild; Heijmans, Jeroen; [Mallon, Bill](/wiki/Bill_Mallon "Bill Mallon"); et al. ["Aluan Ricciardi"](https://web.archive.org/web/20200417202041/https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/ri/aluan-ricciardi-1.html). *Olympics at Sports-Reference.com*. [Sports Reference LLC](/wiki/Sports_Reference "Sports Reference"). Archived from [the original](https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/ri/aluan-ricciardi-1.html) on 17 April 2020. Retrieved 17 January 2019.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

French snowboarder (born 1987)

Aluan Ricciardi

| Personal information | |
| --- | --- |
| Nationality | French |
| Born | (1987-10-26) October 26, 1987 (age 38) |
| Sport | |
| Sport | [Snowboarding](/wiki/Snowboarding "Snowboarding") |

**Aluan Ricciardi** (born 26 October 1987 in [Vera Cruz, Bahia](/wiki/Vera_Cruz,_Bahia "Vera Cruz, Bahia"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")) is a French [snowboarder](/wiki/Snowboarder "Snowboarder"). He placed fifteenth in the [men's halfpipe](/wiki/Snowboarding_at_the_2010_Winter_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_halfpipe "Snowboarding at the 2010 Winter Olympics – Men's halfpipe") event at the [2010 Winter Olympics](/wiki/2010_Winter_Olympics "2010 Winter Olympics").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

1. **[^](#cite_ref-1)** Evans, Hilary; Gjerde, Arild; Heijmans, Jeroen; [Mallon, Bill](/wiki/Bill_Mallon "Bill Mallon"); et al. ["Aluan Ricciardi"](https://web.archive.org/web/20200417202041/https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/ri/aluan-ricciardi-1.html). *Olympics at Sports-Reference.com*. [Sports Reference LLC](/wiki/Sports_Reference "Sports Reference"). Archived from [the original](https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/ri/aluan-ricciardi-1.html) on 17 April 2020. Retrieved 17 January 2019.
